title: Since: The Bombing of Pan Am Flight 103
original_title: Since: The Bombing of Pan Am Flight 103
overview: The 1988 bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 over Lockerbie, Scotland, killed 270 innocent people and began the new age of terrorism. Bound together in tragedy, the victim's relatives fought for justice, only to watch it unravel for Libyan oil.
